option.name: originalContent
option.value:
name: Deploy to GCP VM
on: push: branches: - main # change to your branch
jobs: deploy: runs-on: ubuntu-latest
steps: - name: Deploy via SSH uses: appleboy/ssh-action@v1.0.3 with: host: ${{ secrets.VM_HOST }} username: ${{ secrets.VM_USER }} key: ${{ secrets.VM_SSH_KEY }} port: ${{ secrets.VM_PORT }} script: | mkdir -p /home/kelvinmbugua/ic-robots cd /home/kelvinmbugua/ic-robots
# If directory exists but is not a git repo, clean it if [ -d "ic-markets" ] && [ ! -d "ic-markets/.git" ]; then echo "Directory ic-markets exists but is not a git repo. Cleaning..." rm -rf ic-markets fi
if [ ! -d "ic-markets" ]; then echo "Cloning repository..." git clone https://github.com/${{ github.repository }}.git ic-markets fi
cd ic-markets echo "Current directory: $(pwd)" ls -la
git fetch origin main git reset --hard origin/main
if [ -f "package.json" ]; then mkdir -p logs npm install --omit=dev # Delete existing process to ensure a clean start and avoid ID mismatch issues pm2 delete ic-scalping-bot || true pm2 start ecosystem.config.cjs --update-env pm2 save else echo "Error: package.json not found in $(pwd)" exit 1 fi

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
name: Deploy to VM
on: push: branches: - main # change to your branch
jobs: deploy: runs-on: ubuntu-latest
steps: - name: Deploy via SSH uses: appleboy/ssh-action@v1.0.3 with: host: ${{ secrets.VM_HOST }} username: ${{ secrets.VM_USER }} key: ${{ secrets.VM_SSH_KEY }} port: ${{ secrets.VM_PORT }} script: | mkdir -p "$HOME/ic-robots" cd "$HOME/ic-robots"
# If directory exists but is not a git repo, clean it if [ -d "ic-markets" ] && [ ! -d "ic-markets/.git" ]; then echo "Directory ic-markets exists but is not a git repo. Cleaning..." rm -rf ic-markets fi
if [ ! -d "ic-markets" ]; then echo "Cloning repository..." git clone https://github.com/${{ github.repository }}.git ic-markets fi
cd ic-markets echo "Current directory: $(pwd)" ls -la
git fetch origin main git reset --hard origin/main
if [ -f "package.json" ]; then mkdir -p logs npm install --omit=dev # Delete existing process to ensure a clean start and avoid ID mismatch issues pm2 delete ic-scalping-bot || true pm2 start ecosystem.config.cjs --update-env pm2 save else echo "Error: package.json not found in $(pwd)" exit 1 fi

option.name: originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
